description: The 'Recruit' page loads, transitioning from a skeleton state to a populated participant table.
User scrolls the participant table horizontally to the right to view additional columns including 'Industry', 'Role', and 'Marital status'.
frame_description: Horizontal movement of the table content while the cursor moves across the screen.

description: User hovers the cursor over the 'Have you participate in multiple studies on Askable?' column header.
interaction_target: Have you participate in multiple studies on Askable? column header
